name: @sutro-dev/tsconfig
description: Shared TypeScript base configuration for Sutro packages.

scripts.test: node --input-type=module -e "import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; const config = JSON.parse(readFileSync(new URL('./tsconfig.json', import.meta.url), 'utf8')); if (!config.compilerOptions?.strict) throw new Error('Expected strict mode in tsconfig'); console.log('Validated tsconfig compiler options');"
